title: Swainsona acuticarinata
taxonomy: Swainsona acuticarinata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is native to Western Australia and belongs to the genus Swainsona. The plant's classification is further broken down into the kingdom Plantae, the phylum Magnoliophyta, and the order Fabales. This classification places Swainsona acuticarinata within the larger family of legumes. Further research is needed to confirm its classification in the current botanical system.
uses: Swainsona acuticarinata, also known as the spiny devil, is a plant native to Western Australia. Unfortunately, there is limited information available on its medicinal uses.
